item.title: philhaigh_: Phil Haigh @philhaigh_ · 14min 'I've seen Jimmy do something and it turned out he had ADHD. I thought maybe it's time fo
item.description:
Phil Haigh @philhaigh_ · 14min 'I've seen Jimmy do something and it turned out he had ADHD. I thought maybe it's time for me to, because I'd like to feel a bit better in my own skin.'
Fair play Dave Gilbert for speaking about this, because I don't think he's very comfortable doing so. De metro.co.uk 4 220

item.title:
Livesnooker: Live Snooker @Livesnooker · 1h 𝗗𝗮𝘆 𝗧𝘄𝗼 𝗮𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲 𝗵𝗼𝗺𝗲 𝗼𝗳 𝘀𝗻𝗼𝗼𝗸𝗲𝗿

item.title: stuartpykesport: Stuart Pyke @stuartpykesport · 1h Cita Paddy Power @paddypower · 14h Still no wins for Spurs in 2026. That deal with the
item.description: Stuart Pyke @stuartpykesport · 1h Cita Paddy Power @paddypower · 14h Still no wins for Spurs in 2026. That deal with the devil is really coming back to haunt them... 675
